fields.Front: I am not wearing shoes today
fields.Back: Aku tidak memakai sepatu hari ini

fields.Front: I will meet my girlfriend tonight
fields.Back: Aku akan bertemu pacarku nanti malam

fields.Front: Do you already have a boyfriend?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu sudah punya pacar?

fields.Front: I am buying vegetables at the market
fields.Back: Aku sedang membeli sayur di pasar

fields.Front: That child played in the sand earlier
fields.Back: Anak itu bermain di pasir tadi

fields.Front: I was very tired after working earlier
fields.Back: Aku capek banget setelah kerja tadi

fields.Front: I have not seen the preview of the video
fields.Back: Aku belum melihat pratinjau videonya

fields.Front: I will repeat that exercise tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan mengulang latihan itu besok

fields.Front: I have not wished him a happy birthday yet
fields.Back: Aku belum mengucapkan selamat ulang tahun padanya

fields.Front: I once wished that it would happen
fields.Back: Aku pernah berharap hal itu terjadi

fields.Front: Why did that not happen yesterday?
fields.Back: Mengapa itu tidak terjadi kemarin?

fields.Front: I have not expressed thanks to him yet
fields.Back: Aku belum mengucapkan terima kasih padanya

fields.Front: I said you would come tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku bilang kamu akan datang besok

fields.Front: That key suddenly disappeared from the table
fields.Back: Kunci itu tiba-tiba hilang dari meja

fields.Front: I am sleepy, so I want to sleep
fields.Back: Aku lagi ngantuk, jadi mau tidur

fields.Front: Have you ever seen that animal?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu pernah melihat binatang itu?

fields.Front: That animal is not my pet
fields.Back: Hewan itu bukan peliharaan aku

fields.Front: I am taking care of a new pet at home
fields.Back: Aku sedang merawat peliharaan baru di rumah

fields.Front: I will raise that small kitten
fields.Back: Aku akan pelihara kucing kecil itu

fields.Front: I am taking care of my sick mother
fields.Back: Aku sedang merawat ibuku yang sakit

fields.Front: I have not fasted today
fields.Back: Aku belum berpuasa hari ini

fields.Front: Thousands of people will come to that event
fields.Back: Ribuan orang akan datang ke acara itu

fields.Front: That ship did not approach the deep sea trench
fields.Back: Kapal itu tidak mendekati palung laut dalam

fields.Front: I am approaching this month's sales target
fields.Back: Aku sedang mendekati target penjualan bulan ini

fields.Front: Will that ship depart tonight?
fields.Back: Apakah kapal itu akan berangkat malam ini?

fields.Front: His ability has already gone beyond our expectations
fields.Back: Kemampuannya sudah melampaui harapan kita

fields.Front: I do not want to wait here longer
fields.Back: Aku tidak mau lebih lama menunggu di sini

fields.Front: This is the most delicious I have ever tried
fields.Back: Ini paling enak yang pernah aku coba

fields.Front: I will take a walk in the park later
fields.Back: Aku akan jalan santai di taman nanti

fields.Front: We are relaxing at home now
fields.Back: Kami sedang santai di rumah sekarang

fields.Front: That place has not opened since yesterday
fields.Back: Tempat itu belum buka sejak kemarin

fields.Front: We will explore that island next week
fields.Back: Kami akan menjelajah nusa itu minggu depan

fields.Front: He has never explored the forest alone
fields.Back: Dia tidak pernah jelajah hutan sendirian
